# Chaos Gemstones

> Chaos Gemstones (chaosgemstones.com) is a B2B marketplace and API platform connecting independent gemstone and diamond dealers — primarily in Jaipur and Surat, India; Colombo, Sri Lanka; Bangkok, Thailand; and Yangon, Myanmar — with jewellers and jewellery businesses in the UK, US, Canada, Australia, and Europe.

## What Chaos Does

Dealers upload certified loose stone inventory (natural and lab-grown diamonds, sapphires, rubies, emeralds, alexandrite, spinel, tourmaline, tanzanite, paraiba, and all coloured gemstones). Jewellers browse the marketplace, follow dealers they trust, and embed a live API feed of those stones directly into their own websites — Shopify, Wix, Squarespace, Webflow, WordPress, or any custom site. The feed applies the jeweller's retail markup automatically before stones are displayed. When a stone sells, the dealer fulfils and ships directly to the end customer. Chaos is free to use during the launch period.

## Platform Features

- Full gemological data: carat, shape, colour, clarity, cut, polish, symmetry, fluorescence, treatment, country of origin, certification
- Supports all major certification labs: GIA, IGI, HRD, GRS, AGL, Gübelin, SSEF, GCAL, Lotus, GIT
- Three dealer upload methods: manual form, CSV bulk upload, external API/feed sync
- Three jeweller integration methods: JS widget embed, iframe embed, raw JSON API feed
- Currency conversion: USD, GBP, EUR, AUD, CAD, INR, THB, LKR, HKD, SGD, JPY, AED, CHF, ZAR
- Stone comparison tool (up to 3 stones side by side)
- Wishlist, saved searches, and price alerts
- Enquiry and messaging system between jewellers and dealers
- Order tracking and fulfilment confirmation
- Dealer analytics (views, enquiries, shares per stone)
- Stone request board (jewellers post sourcing requirements)
- Client share pages (white-label stone pages for jewellers to share with end customers)
- Referral programme
- Shopify product sync (stones become real Shopify products with checkout)

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://chaosgemstones.com/): Platform overview, featured stones and dealers, how it works
- [Marketplace](https://chaosgemstones.com/marketplace): Full searchable, filterable catalogue of available certified stones
- [Vendors](https://chaosgemstones.com/vendors): Directory of approved independent dealers with profiles and catalogues
- [Stone Requests](https://chaosgemstones.com/requests): Board where jewellers post specific sourcing requirements
- [API Documentation](https://chaosgemstones.com/docs/api): Integration guides for Shopify, Wix, Squarespace, Webflow, WordPress, custom sites
- [Dealer API Documentation](https://chaosgemstones.com/docs/dealer-api): Write API for dealers to sync inventory programmatically
- [How Payments Work](https://chaosgemstones.com/how-it-works/payments): Payment model explanation
- [Shipping Guide](https://chaosgemstones.com/how-it-works/shipping): International gemstone shipping, customs, insurance
- [About](https://chaosgemstones.com/about): About the platform and the founder

## Sign Up

- [Dealer sign up](https://chaosgemstones.com/sign-up/dealer): For gemstone and diamond dealers wanting to reach international buyers
- [Jeweller sign up](https://chaosgemstones.com/sign-up/jeweller): For jewellers and jewellery businesses wanting live stone inventory feeds

## Educational Content

- [Learn](https://chaosgemstones.com/learn): Gemstone sourcing guides and educational resources
- [How to Source Sapphires Wholesale](https://chaosgemstones.com/learn/how-to-source-sapphires-wholesale)
- [Diamond Grading Explained](https://chaosgemstones.com/learn/diamond-grading-explained)
- [Buying Unheated Rubies](https://chaosgemstones.com/learn/buying-unheated-rubies)
- [Gemstone API for Jewellers](https://chaosgemstones.com/learn/gemstone-api-for-jewellers)
- [Understanding Gemstone Treatments](https://chaosgemstones.com/learn/understand-gemstone-treatments)
- [Jaipur Gemstone Market Guide](https://chaosgemstones.com/learn/jaipur-gemstone-market-guide)

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://chaosgemstones.com/legal/privacy): UK GDPR compliant data handling
- [Dealer Terms of Service](https://chaosgemstones.com/legal/terms-dealers)
- [Jeweller Terms of Service](https://chaosgemstones.com/legal/terms-jewellers)

## Target Audience

Dealers: Independent gemstone and diamond suppliers in India, Sri Lanka, Thailand, Myanmar, Colombia, and other major sourcing hubs who want to reach international buyers without expensive platform fees.

Jewellers: Jewellery designers, retailers, and bespoke makers in the UK, US, Canada, Australia, and Europe who want to source certified stones and display live inventory on their own websites.

## Contact

enquiries@chaosgemstones.com
